attr.title: Star Wars: Dark Forces
attr.desc: LucasArts 1995 FPS starring Kyle Katarn. Runs on The Force Engine (native Jedi Engine reimplementation) for ARM handhelds and x86_64 Linux. Requires original game files from GOG or Steam.
attr.desc_md: LucasArts 1995 FPS starring Kyle Katarn. Runs on The Force Engine (native Jedi Engine reimplementation) for ARM handhelds and x86_64 Linux. Requires original game files from GOG or Steam.
attr.inst: Copy Dark Forces files to theforceengine/game/ (must include DARK.GOB). GOG and Steam installs work if you copy the game folder contents as-is.
